text:
wen         2010-02-24 05:44:03 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    math                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    math/matio           Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  matio is an ISO C library (with a limited Fortran 90 interface) for reading
  and writing Matlab MAT files.
  
  WWW: http://sourceforge.net/projects/matio/
  
  PR:             ports/143928
  Submitted by:   Rob Farmer <rfarmer@predatorlabs.net>
  Feature safe:   yes
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.641     +1 -0      ports/math/Makefile
  1.1       +40 -0     ports/math/matio/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/math/matio/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/math/matio/pkg-descr (new)
